shortDescription: VFS Cyprus India · National short-stay · NOT Schengen — no EU travel

policyAlert.summary: Confirm Cyprus visitor visa fee before quoting.

alert.title: NOT Schengen — Cyprus only
alert.body: Cyprus visitor visa allows travel to Cyprus only. It does NOT permit entry to Schengen countries (France, Germany, Italy, etc.). Clients needing EU travel must apply for a separate Schengen visa.

about.label: Description
about.value: National short-stay visitor visa for tourism, family visits, or business trips to the Republic of Cyprus. Applied via VFS Global Cyprus India.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Temporary visit purpose · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Clean immigration history · Return travel plan

about.label: NOT Schengen
about.value: Cyprus is EU but NOT Schengen. This visa allows entry to Cyprus only — not France, Germany, Italy, or other Schengen states.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Cyprus Embassy/Consulate · VFS Global Cyprus India (visa.vfsglobal.com/cyprus/india)

about.label: After approval
about.value: Respect visa validity dates. Overstay affects future Cyprus and Schengen applications.

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, strengthen ties and address grounds before reapplication. Do not confuse Cyprus visa with Schengen access.

redFlags.title: Weak ties to India
redFlags.description: Unemployed, no assets, vague return plan.
redFlags.fix: Employment letter, business proof, property, family obligations

redFlags.title: Insufficient travel insurance
redFlags.fix: Purchase adequate travel insurance for full trip dates

redFlags.title: Itinerary inconsistencies
redFlags.fix: Align bookings with cover letter dates

redFlags.title: Prior visa refusals
redFlags.description: Undisclosed prior visa refusals (Cyprus or other countries).
redFlags.fix: Disclose all refusals; address in cover letter

redFlags.title: Wrong application channel
redFlags.description: Client applied for Cyprus visa but intends to travel primarily to Schengen states.
redFlags.fix: Apply at main destination embassy per Cyprus embassy requirements

faqs.q: Can we guarantee Cyprus visitor visa approval?
faqs.a: No. Consulate decides each application individually.

faqs.q: Which embassy to apply?
faqs.a: Apply via Cyprus Embassy in India or VFS Global (visa.vfsglobal.com/cyprus/india). Cyprus is the sole destination.

faqs.q: How much travel insurance?
faqs.a: Minimum €30,000 medical coverage for the entire stay in Cyprus.

faqs.q: Can I visit Schengen countries on this Cyprus visa?
faqs.a: No. This visa is valid for the Republic of Cyprus only. A separate Schengen visa is required for France, Germany, Italy, etc.

faqs.q: How long processing?
faqs.a: Typically 2–4 weeks; apply well before travel date.

faqs.q: Does prior UK/US refusal affect a Cyprus visitor visa application?
faqs.a: Must disclose; consulate considers overall immigration history.

faqs.q: Can visitor work?
faqs.a: No. Employment not permitted on Cyprus short-stay visitor visa.

faqs.q: Reapply after refusal?
faqs.a: Yes when circumstances improve; address prior refusal grounds.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: National short-stay visa for tourism, family visits, or business trips to the Republic of Cyprus via VFS India. Cyprus is EU but NOT Schengen — this visa does NOT allow travel to other Schengen countries.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Temporary visit purpose · Travel insurance €30,000+ · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Clean immigration history

faqs.q: What is Main destination rule for this service?
faqs.a: Apply at embassy of Cyprus Embassy/VFS India. If Cyprus is primary stay, apply via Cypriot mission.

faqs.q: Important note on Main destination rule?
faqs.a: Apply at embassy of Cyprus Embassy/VFS India. If Cyprus is primary stay, apply via Cypriot mission.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Cypriot Embassy/Consulate · VFS Global (appointment partner in India)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Respect visa validity and visa validity dates. Overstay affects future Cyprus visa applications.

faqs.q: Is Valid passport (3+ months beyond stay) required?
faqs.a: Valid passport (3+ months beyond stay) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Travel medical insurance €30,000+ required?
faqs.a: Recommended €30,000+ coverage for entire trip

faqs.q: Is Proof of accommodation and itinerary required?
faqs.a: Proof of accommodation and itinerary is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Proof of funds required?
faqs.a: Proof of funds is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Strong ties to India required?
faqs.a: Strong ties to India is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Cover letter explaining purpose required?
faqs.a: Cover letter explaining purpose is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Biometrics (if not in VIS) required?
faqs.a: Assess whether Biometrics (if not in VIS) is satisfied for this case.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 2–4w — VFS Cyprus India

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: €60–90 — Adult Cyprus visitor visa

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 76% — ~64% benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 10 — + travel insurance

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt & insurance

faqs.q: What if the client has Weak ties to India?
faqs.a: Employment letter, business proof, property, family obligations

faqs.q: Why is Weak ties to India a problem?
faqs.a: Unemployed, no assets, vague return plan.

faqs.q: What if the client has Insufficient travel insurance?
faqs.a: Purchase adequate travel insurance for full trip dates

faqs.q: Why is Insufficient travel insurance a problem?
faqs.a: Coverage below €30,000 or wrong dates.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Purchase travel insurance before VFS appointment
Personalise cover letter with exact dates and purpose
Check visa validity dates if client has recent Cyprus travel
postApproval: Explain visa validity dates in writing
Remind to carry insurance and accommodation proof at border
Note reapplication if travel plans change

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.

sampleDocs.title: Sample invitation / sponsor letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Host details, relationship, accommodation, and duration of stay.

sampleDocs.title: Sample travel itinerary (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Flights, hotels, and day-wise plan for visitor visa credibility.

sampleDocs.title: Sample employment / NOC letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Employer letter confirming leave, role, salary, and return to India.

sampleDocs.title: Sample property / ties document (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Sale deed or tax receipt — explain home-country ties.
